hero.title: Luxury Living in Transylvania
hero.subtitle: Discover Exceptional Properties Across Romania's Most Prestigious Addresses

heritage.title: Heritage & Modernity
heritage.description: We blend centuries of Transylvanian architectural heritage with contemporary luxury design, creating homes that honor the past while embracing the future.

curated.title: Curated Portfolio
curated.description: Each property in our collection is hand-selected to meet the highest standards of luxury and exclusivity, ensuring only the finest make it to our clients.

service.title: White-Glove Service
service.description: From first viewing to final signature, our dedicated team ensures an unparalleled experience tailored to your unique preferences and lifestyle.

about.subtitle: About Transylvania Grand Estate
about.title: Redefining Luxury Real Estate in Romania
about.description: We are Romania's premier luxury real estate consultancy, connecting discerning buyers with exceptional properties across Transylvania and beyond.

investTransylvania.subtitle: Investment Opportunity
investTransylvania.title: Invest in Transylvania
investTransylvania.description: Discover why Transylvania is becoming one of Europe's most compelling real estate investment destinations.

nature.title: Breathtaking Natural Beauty
nature.description: Rolling hills, ancient forests, and the majestic Carpathian Mountains create an unparalleled setting for luxury living.

heritage.title: Rich Cultural Heritage
heritage.description: Medieval citadels, fortified churches, and centuries of history provide a unique backdrop for premium real estate.

market.title: Emerging Investment Market
market.description: A growing economy, EU membership, and increasing international interest make Transylvania a smart investment choice.

lifestyle.title: Exceptional Quality of Life
lifestyle.description: World-class gastronomy, vibrant cultural scenes, and pristine nature combine to offer an enviable lifestyle.

cta.title: Ready to Find Your Dream Property?
cta.subtitle: Let our expert team guide you through Romania's finest luxury residences.

maurer-imobiliare.title: Company Founded
maurer-imobiliare.description: Maurer Imobiliare was established with a vision to redefine residential development in Transylvania, bringing European construction standards to the Romanian market.

maurer-imobiliare.title: First Residential Complex
maurer-imobiliare.description: Launched the inaugural residential project, a 120-unit complex that set new benchmarks for quality and design in the region.

maurer-imobiliare.title: Expansion to Multiple Cities
maurer-imobiliare.description: Expanded operations to three major Transylvanian cities, establishing a reputation for delivering premium living spaces on time and on budget.

maurer-imobiliare.title: 3,000 Homes Milestone
maurer-imobiliare.description: Celebrated the delivery of over 3,000 homes, solidifying the company's position as one of the leading residential developers in Romania.

maurer-imobiliare.title: Sustainability Commitment
maurer-imobiliare.description: Adopted green building practices and energy-efficient design principles across all new developments, earning environmental certifications.

maurer-imobiliare.title: Luxury Portfolio Launch
maurer-imobiliare.description: Introduced a premium luxury line of residences, combining heritage architecture with contemporary comforts for the discerning buyer.

gran-via.title: Company Founded
gran-via.description: Gran Via was established with a focus on crafting distinctive residential developments that blend modern aesthetics with functional elegance.

gran-via.title: First Award-Winning Project
gran-via.description: Received recognition for outstanding architectural design, marking the company as an innovator in the Romanian real estate landscape.

gran-via.title: Premium Segment Entry
gran-via.description: Expanded into the premium residential market, introducing high-end finishes and bespoke design options for select developments.

gran-via.title: Community-Centered Developments
gran-via.description: Launched integrated living concepts featuring shared green spaces, wellness facilities, and community hubs.

nova-building.title: Company Founded
nova-building.description: Nova Building began with a commitment to innovative construction techniques and client-centered design philosophy.

nova-building.title: Technology Integration
nova-building.description: Pioneered smart home integration across all new developments, offering residents cutting-edge living experiences.

nova-building.title: Rapid Growth Phase
nova-building.description: Doubled the project portfolio and expanded the team, delivering multiple simultaneous developments across the region.

nova-building.title: Flagship Luxury Project
nova-building.description: Unveiled an exclusive luxury residential complex, positioning the company at the forefront of premium real estate.

default.title: First Major Development

hero.title: Our Story
hero.subtitle: A New Standard in Luxury Real Estate

founding.title: Founded on Passion
founding.description: Transylvania Grand Estate was born from a vision to transform Romania's luxury real estate landscape. Our founders recognized the untapped potential of Transylvania's architectural heritage and set out to create a consultancy that matches world-class properties with discerning buyers.

mission.title: Our Mission
mission.description: To connect discerning individuals with extraordinary properties that reflect their aspirations and lifestyle. We believe that a home is more than walls and a roof — it's a statement of who you are and how you choose to live.

approach.title: Our Approach
approach.description: Every client relationship begins with understanding. We listen, we learn, and we deliver beyond expectations. Our intimate knowledge of Romania's luxury market, combined with a global perspective, allows us to offer unparalleled guidance at every step.

excellence.title: Excellence
excellence.description: We set the highest standards in everything we do, from property selection to client service, ensuring an experience worthy of the exceptional properties we represent.

discretion.title: Discretion
discretion.description: We understand that luxury transactions require the utmost confidentiality. Your privacy is our priority at every stage of the process.

heritage.title: Heritage
heritage.description: We celebrate Romania's rich architectural and cultural heritage, preserving the stories that make each property unique while integrating modern luxury.

innovation.title: Innovation
innovation.description: We embrace cutting-edge technology and forward-thinking approaches to marketing, presentation, and client communication.

cta.title: Work With Us
cta.subtitle: Join Romania's leading luxury real estate team.

hero.title: Get in Touch
hero.subtitle: We'd Love to Hear From You

Footer.tagline: Romania's Premier Luxury Real Estate Consultancy
Footer.copyright: © {year} Transylvania Grand Estate. All rights reserved.

narrative.label: An Invitation
narrative.manifesto: For centuries, Transylvania has guarded its treasures behind ancient forests and mountain passes. We open the gates to a select few — those who understand that true luxury is not merely owned, but inherited from the land itself.

nature.title: The Carpathian Highlands
nature.body: Where pristine forests meet alpine meadows, and rivers carve valleys untouched by time. This is the setting for a life without compromise.

heritage.title: Castles & Citadels
heritage.body: Seven centuries of fortified churches, medieval citadels, and noble estates. History here is not preserved behind glass — it is lived in.

market.title: An Emerging Frontier
market.body: EU membership, double-digit appreciation, and a global spotlight turning eastward. The most astute investors are already here.

lifestyle.title: A Life Refined
lifestyle.body: Michelin-caliber gastronomy, world-class wine regions, and cultural seasons rivaling any European capital. This is not a retreat — it is an arrival.

brand.label: Our Ethos
brand.title: Redefining What Luxury Means
brand.description: We do not merely sell properties. We curate legacies — connecting visionary individuals with estates that will define their families for generations. In Transylvania, we have found a land where the extraordinary is still possible.

primary.name: Bran Castle
primary.tagline: Where legend and stone become one

secondary.name: Corvin Castle
secondary.tagline: Gothic grandeur above the Zlaști River

primary.name: Peleș Castle
primary.tagline: A royal masterpiece in the Carpathian pines

secondary.name: Biertan Fortified Church
secondary.tagline: Saxon faith, carved into the hillside

primary.name: Transfăgărășan Highway
primary.tagline: The world's most dramatic mountain road

closing.headline: Your Legacy Awaits
closing.subline: Arrange a private consultation with our team.
